DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL DEAN & ATTY. KRISTINA T. CARBONELL OF THE RIBERA LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 576-1600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHANIE T. YANG OF LEWIS BRISBOIS LLP, TEL. NO. 438-5932 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MONSIGNOR JAMES TARANTINO, CAPUCHIN FRANCISCAN ORDER OF CALIFORNIA - WESTERN AMERICAN PROVINCE AND THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT - The Demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint ("SAC") is sustained in part and overruled in part. As to the first cause of action for sexual harassment in violation of FEHA, the Demurrer is sustained as to Defendant Tarantino with leave to amend to allege, if Plaintiff can in good faith, Defendant Tarantino's status as an employer. If Tarantino is an employee of Defendant Archbishop of San Francisco ("ASF"), the exclusion for religious corporations in Gov. Code section 12940(j)(4)(B) applies to exclude ASF's employees from FEHA liability as a matter of law. (Gov. Code section 12940(j)(3).) Further, the demurrer is also sustained because the Complaint fails to allege sexual harassment by Tarantino personally. The Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the second cause of action for sexual harassment in violation of the Unruh Act. The Unruh Act does not apply in employment or quasi-employment contexts. (See, e.g., Alcorn v. Anbro Eng'g, Inc. (1970) 2 Cal.3d 493, 500 [the Act applies only to business establishments "in the course of furnishing goods, services or facilities to its clients, patrons or customers"].) All of the alleged activity here arises in the employment context and therefore the Complaint cannot be amended to cure the defect. As to the fourth and fifth causes of action for negligent supervision and negligent hiring and/or retention against Defendant Tarantino, the Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege, if Plaintiff can in good faith, Defendant Tarantino's status as an employer. The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend the conspiracy to commit sexual harassment cause of action in light of the rulings on the demurrers to the FEHA and Unruh Act causes of action. As to the 10th cause of action for conspiracy to commit fraud, the Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to permit Plaintiff to allege facts supporting each element of the cause of action with the requisite specificity. The Demurrer is overruled as to the cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress. The SAC alleges that Defendant Tarantino knew about the extreme sexual harassment and abuse, and failed to act, and that he monitored and observed the sexual conduct using the video cameras in the church. Such behavior, if proved, could be deemed extreme and outrageous. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order
pursuant to CRC 3.1312. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
